---
title: ""
format:
  typst:
    papersize: a5
    margin:
      x: 22mm
      y: 28mm
    mainfont: "芫荽"
    fontsize: 10pt
lang: zh-TW
---

```{=typst}
#set page(numbering: none, footer: none, header: none)

#v(1.1fr)
#align(center)[
  #text(font: "芫荽", size: 31pt, tracking: 0.08em)[46歲的人生設計]
  #v(1.2em)
  #text(size: 12pt, fill: luma(38%))[不是重來一次，而是重新配置你的時間、身體、關係與現金流]
]
#v(2.2fr)
#align(center)[
  #text(size: 11pt)[Pilot v0.1]
  #v(0.8em)
  #text(size: 10pt, fill: luma(45%))[A5 商業書樣章]
]
```
